objective_gates_from_persisted_report.acceptance: persisted objective report accepted as terminal

observed_operation_summary.touch_target_controls_below_24_note: The single below-24 hit is a P.field-help paragraph (data-hook selected but non-interactive); not counted as friction.

discoverability.evidence: Section nav with five in-page anchors, skip link to #main-content, ten headings, error-summary region, explicit Save progress and Clear saved progress affordances, progressbar landmark for step state.

navigation.evidence: Anchor links jump between sections; skip link works; Tab from top surfaces 58 focusable stops with zero hidden-ancestor leaks; error-summary link moves focus into the flagged field.

input_burden.evidence: Standard flat form with grouped sections; explicit Save-progress adds one optional tap that improves confidence; no unnecessary steps or forced pagination.

error_prevention_recovery.evidence: Blank submit surfaces grouped error summary and moves focus; inline error on invalid postcode after blur, cleared when '2000' re-entered; missing review checkbox triggers scoped review error only.

feedback_status.evidence: Live status region announces save, shipping change, and post-confirmation duplicate-block ('Synthetic order placed once. Confirmation ID SYN-2048.'); progressbar valuenow/valuetext advertises step; aria-busy signalled during submit.

accessibility.evidence: Landmarks (header/main/nav/footer), heading outline, progressbar landmark, skip link, no focus stops on hidden ancestors in normal or compact mode, keyboard-completable end-to-end.

responsive_touch_ergonomics.evidence: 47 interactive controls measured at 390x844; every truly interactive control >=24px on minor axis; layout renders cleanly at 320x568 and 360x800.

interruption_resumption.evidence: Explicit Save progress and safe reload restore contact/delivery/shipping with payment fields empty; however after a successful placement a reload returns the user to an editable form with Place order re-enabled, weaker interruption/duplicate-safety across a reload boundary than the strongest candidate.

latency_perception.evidence: Purely local, zero external requests (0/18 total); no perceptible submit latency; reduced-motion respected.

destructive_actions.evidence: Clear-saved-progress opens a confirmation region with Cancel default-focused, dismissible with Cancel or Escape (values preserved); Confirm only clears once explicitly chosen; duplicate submit is a no-op with status message.

cognitive_load.evidence: Well-organized sections and plain language, but the extra chrome (progressbar + save + clear + compact) adds a bit more to scan than the leanest candidate.

visual_information_clarity.evidence: Progressbar surfaces where the shopper is; totals block readable; synthetic-value help text distinguishes fictional data; confirmation region visually and textually explicit.

primary_qualitative_strengths: Full destructive-safety triad on Clear-progress: Confirm + Cancel + Escape.
Explicit Save progress with live status announcement.
Progressbar landmark improves feedback and orientation.
Zero focus leaks in compact mode.
primary_qualitative_frictions: Post-confirmation reload returns the form to editable state with Place order re-enabled; weaker duplicate-safety across a reload than the strongest candidate.
Slightly more chrome than the leanest candidate keeps cognitive load at 4 rather than 5.
